known_limitations.limitation: Lake Formation API doesn't expose MfaRequired field directly. Current check uses DataLakeAdmins existence as a proxy indicator that settings are configured.
known_limitations.impact: Cannot directly validate MFA requirement through API - uses proxy check

known_limitations.limitation: Lake Formation API doesn't expose direct audit logging configuration field. Lake Formation logs to CloudTrail automatically. Current check uses Parameters existence as a proxy indicator that settings are configured.
known_limitations.impact: Cannot directly validate audit logging configuration through API - uses proxy check

recommendations.description: Both rules check DataLakeAdmins field but with different operators (equals [] vs exists). These are distinct checks and should remain separate.
recommendations.impact: No action needed - rules are correctly separated
